data.body:
Gap Analysis AC amendment: Test harness must set GIT_BINARY to a real git that supports interpret-trailers.

T3a-impl uses set -euo pipefail and calls git interpret-trailers. In test environments where git < 2.6 or interpret-trailers is unavailable, all tests would fail for the wrong reason (not because the feature is unimplemented, but because git is misconfigured).

Amended test setup: Set GIT_BINARY to the system git path at the start of the test file (e.g., GIT_BINARY=$(command -v git)) and export it. The tests rely on the check_git_version STUB (always returns 0 in T3a-impl), so interpret-trailers must be available. If git version < 2.6 in the test environment, the test suite should skip with a clear message rather than fail with a misleading error.
